infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Aiteall sends you daily planning reminders and check-ins to help you stay on track.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Aiteall adds your time blocks to your calendar so your day is always visible.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Aiteall adds your time blocks to your calendar so your day is always visible.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Aiteall uses your microphone so you can voice-record your brain dumps and planning sessions.
infoPlist.UISpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Aiteall transcribes your voice notes to help you capture ideas hands-free.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Aiteall reads your due-today reminders to include them in your morning planning context.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Aiteall lets you attach a photo to a chat message — for example a whiteboard sketch, a screenshot, or a printed schedule — so the AI can read it and help you plan.
infoPlist.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Aiteall lets you attach a PDF (a brief, a deck, a school doc) to a chat so the AI can read it and help you act on it.
infoPlist._comment_quickActions: Quick Actions are registered DYNAMICALLY via expo-quick-actions in src/services/quickActions.ts. Do not re-add UIApplicationShortcutItems here — having both static (Info.plist) and dynamic (runtime setItems) declared simultaneously caused duplicate entries in the long-press menu on iOS 17 (CP-Bug #57).
